zh.Hebrides, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭賀布利德斯
zh.Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾洛姆丘斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan於大約1265年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾時，他的父親Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh36歲，母親Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay25歲。他於1291年與Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾洛哈結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1345年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾配第享年82歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Hebrides, Scotland: 英国苏格兰賀布利德斯
zh-hans.Rothiemurchus, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰音巴內-爾洛姆丘斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan于大约1265年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾时，他的父亲Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh36岁，母亲Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay25岁。他于1291年与Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan在苏格兰音巴內-爾洛哈结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1345年在苏格兰音巴內-爾配第享年82岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mackintosh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McIntosh
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Toisich ‘son of the chief’. Compare Mackintosh .

History: Clan Mackintosh is a Highland Scottish clan claiming descent from Shaw McDuff, a 12th-century chief (second son of Duncan, Earl of Fife), who established the traditional family seat at Perry, Morays. The chiefs of Clan Mackintosh have been regarded as leaders of the Chattan Confederation since 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Angus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Scottish Gaelic name Aonghas . Though still having a Scottish flavour, it has been used increasingly in modern times also by people without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Aonghas
meanings: Pronounced ‘een-yis’; from Celtic words meaning ‘one’ and ‘choice’. This is the name of an ancient Celtic god, and is first recorded as a personal name in Adomnan's ‘Life of St Columba’, where it occurs in the form Oinogus(s)ius as the name of a man for whom the saint prophesied a long life and a peaceful death. This is also almost certainly the name of the 8th-century Pictish king variously recorded as Onnust and Hungus.

en.lifeSummary: When Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan was born about 1265, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh, was 36 and his mother, Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay, was 25. He married Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan in 1291, in Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1345, in Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 82, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan est né environ 1265, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan en 1291, à Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1345, à Petty, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan um 1265 in Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh 36 und seine Mutter Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay 25. Er hat 1291 in Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1345 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan è nato il circa 1265 nel Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan nel 1291, nel Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1345, nel Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattanが約1265年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで生まれた時，父Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintoshは36歳，母Mora Mor MacDonald of Islayは25歳であった。1291年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアロチャバーでEva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1345年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアペッティで82歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan(이)가 대략 1265년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1291년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 럭압어에서 Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1345년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 페티에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1265–about 1345: tany ho any amin'ny 1265–tany ho any amin'ny 1345

mn.Inverness-shire, Scotland: Siorrachd Inbhir Nis, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan nasceu aproximadamente 1265, em Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan em 1291, em Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1345, em Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan родился около 1265 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan в 1291 г. в местности лочабир, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1345 г. в местности петти, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan nació aproximadamente 1265, en Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Ferquhar Mackintosh 5th Chief of Mackintosh, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mora Mor MacDonald of Islay, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan en 1291, en Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1345, en Petty, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
